reasoning: The question primarily depends on whether Grand Theft Auto VI releases in 2025, as a high-profile AAA title from Rockstar will certainly release concurrently in Europe (a massive market) upon its global launch. As of late April 2025, Take-Two Interactive continues to reiterate a Fall 2025 release window, with CEO Strauss Zelnick explicitly reconfirming this in April. They have held off on announcing a definitive month/day, which Zelnick attributes to a deliberate late-marketing strategy rather than internal uncertainty. While prominent insider Jason Schreier predicted in early January 2025 that the game would slip into 2026, this was framed as a prediction based on Rockstar's historical tendency to delay games, rather than a hard report of a finalized internal delay. With only ~6 months to go and continuous reassurances from the studio, the probability of a 2025 release remains very high, aligning closely with the community consensus (~83%). The upcoming mid-May earnings call is the next potential risk event for a delay, but current evidence overwhelmingly supports the Fall 2025 target.
